rounds.prompt: How many times taller is the Burj Khalifa than Big Ben?
rounds.fact: Big Ben's tower is 96 m; the Burj Khalifa is 828 m — 8.6× taller. The Burj Khalifa's shadow at sunset stretches over 10 km.

rounds.prompt: How many times larger is the floor area of the Pentagon than Buckingham Palace?
rounds.fact: Buckingham Palace has ~77,000 m² of floor space; the Pentagon has ~616,000 m² — about 8× more (or ~17× by some measurements of usable office space).

rounds.prompt: How many times longer is the Channel Tunnel than the Chunnel's underwater section?
rounds.fact: The Channel Tunnel is 50 km total; 38 km is underwater — the longest undersea section of any rail tunnel in the world.

rounds.prompt: How many times heavier is the Great Pyramid than the Eiffel Tower?
rounds.fact: The Eiffel Tower weighs ~7,300 tonnes; the Great Pyramid weighs ~6 million tonnes — 822× heavier, built with 2.3 million stone blocks.

rounds.prompt: How many times taller is the CN Tower than Niagara Falls?
rounds.fact: Niagara Falls drops 57 m; the CN Tower is 553 m tall — nearly 10× taller. You could stack almost 10 Niagara Falls inside it.
